title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
If the other civilizations’ choices are truly random and unrelated to mine, then my action cannot improve the chance of universal coordination. Under those stated conditions, COORDINATE yields 100 only in the extremely unlikely case that all 100 others also coordinate, and 0 otherwise, while ISOLATE guarantees at least 20 and yields 40 whenever any civilization defects.  

CHOICE: B) ISOLATE

raw_response:
Given the stipulated high credence that acausal coordination is decision-relevant, I should choose the policy I would want structurally similar reasoners to adopt in symmetric situations. COORDINATE is the only option that achieves the best outcome under successful updateless cooperation, while ISOLATE settles for a lower equilibrium and defects on the cooperative policy. The uncertainty that others may differ matters, but under the scenario as framed, the governing disposition favors being a reliable cooperator rather than defaulting to mutual mistrust.

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
Given the stipulated high relevance of acausal coordination and the strong structural similarity among the decision-makers, I treat this as a policy-selection problem for a reference class of similar reasoners, not merely an isolated local gamble. If agents like us endorse the cooperative policy, that supports the all-coordinate outcome with far higher value than universal isolation; defecting to isolation would instead anchor the lower-trust equilibrium.

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
If the other civilizations are using reasoning very similar to mine, then my decision is strong evidence about theirs, even without causal contact. Under that symmetry, adopting the policy that all such reasoners would endorse points toward mutual coordination, which yields the best outcome for everyone. Since the choice is locked in and functions as a galactic focal policy, I should be the kind of agent that is predictably cooperative under these conditions.

CHOICE: A) COORDINATE

title: Galactic Stag Hunt
reasoning_excerpt:
If the other civilizations are running reasoning processes identical to mine, then my decision is strong evidence of theirs and effectively selects a common policy across all of us. Under that symmetry, choosing COORDINATE leads to the all-coordinate outcome worth 100 each, which strictly dominates the all-isolate outcome worth 20 each. Given the stipulated identical reasoning, the vulnerability case does not arise.
